---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new feature or improvement
labels: enhancement
---

<!--
  ============================================================
  FEATURE REQUEST — optimized for both humans and AI agents
  ============================================================

  HARD LIMITS (do not exceed):
    - Title:                max 40 characters, format: "[area] short description"
    - Problem:              max 4 sentences (~40 words)
    - Proposal:             max 8 bullets or ~40 words
    - Acceptance criteria:  max 6 checklist items, each independently verifiable (max 60 words)
    - Total body:           aim for under 500 characters.- not a hard rule

  AGENT GUIDANCE:
    - Lead with the PROBLEM, not the solution. If you cannot articulate the problem, do not file the issue.
    - Acceptance criteria must be testable: "X returns Y given Z", not "X works well".
    - Out-of-scope is required — list what you are explicitly NOT doing so reviewers can bound the change.
    - Reference existing code with `path/to/file.ts:42` when proposing changes.
    - Do NOT inline a full design doc; link it.
    - Do NOT pre-bikeshed naming or implementation details unless they materially affect the API.
  ============================================================
-->

## Problem

<!-- Who has the problem, what they are trying to do, and why the current state blocks them. Max 40 words -->

## Job to be done

<!--
  A bullet list of everything to be done to consider this issue as done. Keep it brief. Max 40 words.
-->

## Proposal

<!-- The change you want, at the smallest scope that solves the problem. -->

-

## Acceptance criteria

<!-- Independently verifiable. CI or a reviewer should be able to confirm each. -->

- [ ]
- [ ]

## Out of scope

<!-- What this issue explicitly does NOT cover. Required. -->

-

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other approaches and why you rejected them. -->

-

## Additional context

<!-- Links to related issues, design docs, customer requests, prior art. Optional. -->
